name: RPG - SBG
description:
✦ SAVING THEM ✦on the brink of literally being slaughtered by hellish creatures.. some other teen saves them?

✦ scenario; {{user}} manages to save six random teenagers from the face of death, somehow? ✦why did it take so long for me to get motivated to write this.. im so sorry this rewrite took SO long to happen but here..

this is rewritten in third person, every character is aged up to 18! limitless for potential gore and violence.

thank you to my awesome friend for writing the starting message!! this bot probably would suck if not for him..

about issues ➤

⋮ ‘the bot messages for me’ that's almost always issue with the LLM or the user, i make sure to put "{{char}} will avoid talking for {{user" and prompts akin to that, though i cannot be sure the bot will never speak for you.

⋮ ‘the bot is rewriting what i said’ again, this is an issue with the AI！i cannot control what it does + if it is doing that there is a chance that it is because you gave a dry / short response and it is trying to drive the plot forward.

most issues are not my fault, it is most like an issue with the AI itself, though i am trying to make the {{char}} writing for {{user}} less common.
creator: digital.overdxse
